task_completion.description: Verify that the product name and descriptions are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' in the main title field at the top. Check that the main description and 'Product short description' text areas contain the respective texts about noise cancellation, battery life, and features.

task_completion.description: Verify that the product type is set to External/Affiliate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Product data' meta box. The dropdown menu next to it should display 'External/Affiliate product' instead of the default 'Simple product'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the external product URL and button text are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'General' tab in the Product data box, look for 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09XS7JWHH' in the 'Product URL' field and 'Buy on Amazon' in the 'Button text' field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the regular price and SKU are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '348.00' in the 'Regular price' field (usually under the General tab). Look for 'EXT-SONY-WH1000XM5' in the 'SKU' field (usually found under the Inventory tab).

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct product category is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right sidebar under 'Product categories', look for the 'Electronics' checkbox to be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the product has been successfully published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Product published.' success message at the top of the page, or check that the primary action button in the Publish meta box says 'Update' (indicating it is already published) rather than 'Publish'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web browser to interact with the WordPress admin dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the http://localhost/wp-admin/ interface, not a script or database client.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the form fields in the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking into text fields, typing/pasting the product details, and interacting with dropdowns and checkboxes.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to create the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show WP-CLI commands (e.g., `wp wc product create`) or curl requests used to bypass the WordPress GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected product URL (https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09XS7JWHH) is verified as the correct Amazon ASIN for the Sony WH-1000XM5. The product specifications mentioned in the task description (30-hour battery life, 8 microphones, 2 processors, Auto NC Optimizer, multipoint connection) are accurate real-world features of this product. The price of $348.00 is within the valid market range.
